description_long: This monument is a stone obelisk with a prominent five-pointed star at its center, painted red and featuring a metallic emblem in the middle. The obelisk rises from a rectangular base, which is bordered by two square plinths on either side, one of which appears to have a circular metal or stone fixture on top. The front face of the obelisk includes an inscription panel beneath the star, while the rear is plain and weathered. The structure sits on a rectangular patch of artificial grass or moss, with scattered brown leaves adding a natural touch. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or memorial function, likely of Soviet or military significance.
description: A stone obelisk with a red star and metallic emblem, flanked by two square plinths and set on a grassy base with scattered leaves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red star with metallic emblem, inscription panel, and both square plinths with one featuring a circular fixture.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the obelisk and the depth of the base, with the circular fixture visible on the right plinth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the obelisk and the weathered stone surface, with both plinths visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other narrow profile and the top of the left plinth, which is flat and undecorated.
attribute_inscription: There is an inscription panel on the front face below the red star, with text in a sans-serif style, likely in Cyrillic script. The text is partially legible but not fully readable from the image.
attribute_ornamentation: A large red five-pointed star with a metallic emblem at its center is mounted on the front face. No other decorative carvings or motifs are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular stone platform with two square plinths at either end. One plinth has a circular fixture on top, possibly for flowers or candles. The base is bordered by a patch of artificial grass or moss and scattered leaves.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is a sharp, pointed stone apex with a clean, angular finish and no additional decoration.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a rectangular patch of artificial grass or moss with scattered brown leaves. No other notable features are present.
